name: Carrom Multiplayer
author: Poki
description: Slide into Carrom Multiplayer, the ultimate carrom board game on Poki! Whether you’re a casual flicker or a seasoned striker, experience the thrill of carrom like never before with exciting gameplay modes: single-player, online multiplayer, and local matches. Show off your precision and strategy while unlocking exclusive strikers, boards, and stylish themes through our in-game economy. Earn achievements, collect rewards, and climb the global leaderboards to prove you’re the true Carrom master! Challenge friends, test your skills against AI opponents, or compete with players worldwide in fast, competitive matches. With smooth controls, vibrant visuals, and endless replayability, Carrom Multiplayer delivers non-stop fun for all ages. Ready to pocket them all and become the ultimate striker champion? How do I play Carrom Multiplayer? Use your mouse select the direction in which you launch the pucks, drag and release to select the strength with which you fire them! Who created Carrom Multiplayer? Carrom Multiplayer is created by InfinityGames.io. Play their other games on Poki: Checkers Multiplayer , Tic Tac Toe , Energy , Infinity Loop: Hex , Merge Shapes , Ludo Online , Shapes , Solitaire , Spider Solitaire , Sudoblocks , Laser Quest , Wood Blocks 3D , Classic Chess , Chess Multiplayer , and Maze: Path of Light ! How can I play Carrom Multiplayer for free? You can play Carrom Multiplayer for free on Poki. Can I play Carrom Multiplayer on mobile devices and desktop? Carrom Multiplayer can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Carrom Multiplayer with my friend? Yes! Carrom Multiplayer is a multiplayer game so you can play online with your friends!
